c.d: The range of operating systems and devices on which the app is available.
c.s: Official app websites, app store listings

c.d: The maximum number of contacts to whom a message can be broadcast simultaneously.
The ability to customize messages with placeholders for recipient-specific information.
Whether the app provides end-to-end encryption for messages, ensuring privacy.
The pricing structure of the app, including free tiers and subscription options.
c.s: Official pricing pages, app store listings

c.d: The ability of the app to integrate with other services or platforms, such as CRM systems.
The ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.
The ability to send various media types, such as images, videos, and documents.
The ability to schedule messages to be sent at a later time or date.
The responsiveness and helpfulness of the app's customer support services.
